headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://sepolia.base.org https://*.walletconnect.com wss://*.walletconnect.com https://*.reown.com wss://*.reown.com https://*.basescan.org; frame-src 'self' https://*.walletconnect.com https://*.reown.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
